resultList.dtldesc: 3 BHK Apartment for Sale in Sarjapur Road, Bangalore::::::::Situated in the sought-after locality of Sarjapur Road, Bangalore, this semi-furnished apartment at DSR Eden Greens offers a blend of comfort, convenience, and modern living. With excellent connectivity to Karmelaram Railway Station and close proximity to reputed schools and hospitals, this home is ideal for families seeking a well-connected yet peaceful environment.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::This ready-to-move apartment spans a super built-up area of 1,730 sq. ft with a carpet area of 1,300 sq. ft. Located on the 4th floor of a 10-storey building, the home is thoughtfully designed to maximise space and natural light. It features 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 2 balconies with an open view. The layout includes a combined living and dining area, along with a modular kitchen fitted with a chimney. Flooring consists of vitrified tiles across the apartment, while the master bedroom is finished with wooden flooring. The property is Vastu compliant and faces the north-east direction. Two covered car parking spaces are included.::::::::Facilities::::::::The apartment is equipped with essential facilities such as 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, and 2 lifts. Security features include CCTV surveillance and dedicated security personnel. Residents also have access to all basic amenities within the society, creating a safe and comfortable living experience.::::::::Locality::::::::Sarjapur Road is a prime residential hub with excellent social infrastructure. Hospitals are located within 1 km, and schools are within 2-3 km of the property, ensuring easy access to essential services. The area also offers supermarkets, malls, banks, ATMs, and reliable public transport, making everyday living highly convenient. With its proximity to Karmelaram Railway Station and strong connectivity to other parts of the city, this property stands out as a well-balanced option for families.

This vaastu-compliant residence, graced with an east-facing orientation, beckons you to a harmonious living space where every detail is crafted for a life of utmost tranquility and convenience.Property SpecificationsBoasting a generous super area of 2624 sqft and a carpet area of 1300 sqft, this penthouse, situated on the pinnacle 5th floor of a distinguished 5-floor building, promises an unparalleled living experience. Step into an unfurnished canvas ready for your personal touch, featuring three spacious bedrooms, each adorned with an attached western-style bathroom for added convenience. Two of the bathrooms are ensuites, and the third serves as a common bathroom, all equipped with geysers and solar provisions for your year-round comfort.Indulge in the luxury of three balconies, offering enchanting views of the road and garden. One balcony is attached to a bedroom, another graces the living area, and the third complements the well-appointed kitchen. The living cum dining area provides a harmonious space for relaxation and entertainment, while an additional room, serving as a sit-out area, adds versatility to the floor plan.The heart of the home, the modular kitchen, is equipped with a chimney and a piped gas connection, ensuring a seamless culinary experience. The utility area attached to the kitchen adds practicality to daily chores. Revel in the elegance of vitrified tile flooring throughout the penthouse, creating a refined ambience.Facilities Parking is a breeze with one covered and one open parking space, ensuring the safety of your vehicles. Enjoy round-the-clock water supply, supported by both borewell and corporation sources, and the assurance of 100 power backup. The presence of a security guard adds an extra layer of safety and peace of mind. This elevated living experience is complemented by the convenience of a lift, enhancing accessibility throughout the building. Locality The landmark Sri Jnanakshi Vidyaniketan School stands as a testament to the prime location of this penthouse. Within a 1 km radius, discover reputable schools, hospitals, malls and supermarkets, simplifying your daily life. Banks and ATMs are conveniently close, providing easy access to financial services. Public transportation, including buses and autos, is easily available, while the metro station is just 3 km away, ensuring seamless connectivity to various parts of the city.

resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a magnificent opportunity to own a luxurious 4 BHK flat in the prestigious L and T Raintree Boulevard, located in the prime area of Hebbal, Bangalore. This exquisite property offers brand new construction, allowing you to customize the interiors as per your preferences.Property specificationsIntroducing a stunning and spacious 4 BHK apartment in a vaastu-compliant and east-facing building. With a super area of 2500 sqft, this apartment is situated on the 8th floor of a 14-storey tower and features 4 bedrooms, with 3 attached bathrooms and one common bathroom. All the bathrooms have western-style fixtures and geyser points. Additionally, there are three balconies, including one attached to the bedroom, one in the kitchen as a utility, and one in the living room, providing scenic views of the nearby mall and road. The living area is combined with the dining space, creating a seamless flow of space for entertaining guests.In addition to the bedrooms and living area, this apartment also boasts a servant room with an attached bathroom, providing convenience and privacy. The kitchen is well-equipped with a normal layout and a piped gas connection available for hassle-free cooking. The flooring throughout the apartment is a combination of vitrified and ceramic tiles, ensuring durability and easy maintenance.FacilitiesWith two covered parking spaces for your convenience, we provide 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, ensuring uninterrupted water availability. In addition, there is a 100 power backup facility to keep you comfortable even during power outages. Your safety is a top priority, as the building is equipped with security guards and CCTV surveillance systems and features two lifts, making it easy for residents to effortlessly move between floors.But the amenities dont stop there. Indulge in a luxurious lifestyle with access to a range of exciting facilities. The property also includes a barlounge area, a golf course, a swimming pool, an indoor games room, and a health club with a steam room and Jacuzzi. Stay fit and active with a fully equipped gymnasium, as well as indoor squash and badminton courts for sports enthusiasts.Locality  The flat is ideally located near the Jakkur signal, making it a landmark in the area. The property enjoys close proximity to various schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets. Public transportation is readily available, with buses and other modes of transportation easily accessible from the area. For banking needs, there are banks and ATMs located very close to the property, providing convenient financial services. Furthermore, the upcoming metro station at the entrance of the property adds to the excellent connectivity, making commuting even more convenient for residents.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover your dream home in the prestigious Ambiant The Infiniti, located in the serene Canara Bank Colony, Uttarahalli Hobli, Bangalore. This spacious 3 BHK flat offers the perfect blend of comfort, modern amenities, and a prime location.Property Specifications This 3 BHK flat in Ambiant The Infiniti, located on the 10th floor of a 12-story building, offers a spacious super built-up area of 1900 sqft. The flat is unfurnished, giving you the flexibility to personalize the space to your taste. It features three well-sized bedrooms, with two attached bathrooms and one common bathroom, all designed with western-style fittings and geyser points for added convenience.The master bedroom is complemented by a private balcony that offers peaceful garden views, while the living room also has a balcony overlooking the road. The flat includes a separate living and dining area, perfect for family gatherings, and a dedicated puja room for spiritual moments.The kitchen comes with a platform and sink, along with a piped gas connection and an attached utility area for your convenience. The flooring is made of high-quality vitrified tiles, adding a touch of elegance to the space. Additionally, the flat is Vaastu-compliant and east-facing, ensuring good natural light and ventilation. Ideal for families seeking comfort and space, this flat is a perfect blend of functionality and peaceful living in a prime location.Facilities This property offers excellent facilities, including covered parking, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation, and 100 power backup. Security is ensured with a dedicated guard and CCTV surveillance. Two lifts are available for easy access.Residents can enjoy a range of amenities such as a swimming pool, gymnasium, visitor parking, intercom facility, kids play area, indoor games room, half basketball court, cricket net practice area, aesthetically designed landscape garden, and a badminton court.Locality The property is strategically located on Uttarahalli Main Road, opposite Canara Bank, making it easily accessible. Educational institutions such as National Public School Banashankari 3 km, Bangalore International Public School 1.5 km, and Deccan International School 2.4 km are nearby. Nano Hospital is located directly opposite the building for quick access to medical care.For shopping and leisure, Prestige Falcon City Mall is within 4.7 km. Banks and ATMs are in close proximity for everyday financial needs. Public transport options, including buses and autos, are easily available, and the property is just 9.5 km from KSR City Junction Railway Station. The Vajarahalli Metro Station is 4 km away, providing convenient connectivity across the city.
